description:
## Parent

bsm-7en — Render selected issue details in the issue explorer

## Background

Verification found the implementation matches the child slices overall, but the selected Issue Detail layout does not match the parent epic ordering. The epic requires: description, dependencies, other metadata, comments. The current UI renders comments before dependencies/metadata.

The user also wants the Parent metadata promoted from the Other metadata section to right below the title.

## What to build

- Reorder selected Issue Detail sections so the visible layout is: title/header, primary metadata, labels, description, dependencies, other metadata, comments.
- Move Parent metadata out of the Other metadata section and render it directly below the title/header, close to the Issue ID. Keep it hidden when `issue.parent` is empty or whitespace.
- Update tests to lock the new ordering and Parent placement.
- Keep the feature read-only. Do not add dependency navigation or extra `bw` calls.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Comments render after Other metadata.
- [ ] Dependencies render before Other metadata.
- [ ] Parent appears directly below the title/header when present.
- [ ] Parent no longer appears in Other metadata.
- [ ] Empty/whitespace Parent remains hidden.
- [ ] Focused component tests pass.
- [ ] Existing unit and E2E tests still pass or any unrun checks are reported.

## Blocked by

None.
title: Fix Issue Detail section ordering
